title: Convert pipeline from name-based to role-based casting
description: Refactor 507 hardcoded agent name references across 47 files to use role-based language

scope.in: Pipeline docs, skill definitions, casting rules, agent personality cross-references — all converted from name-based to role-based. Add role-resolution instructions to SKILL.md.
scope.out: Do not rename agent .md filenames. Do not change agent-registry.json. Do not change game code or dashboard UI. Leave historical lesson references as-is.

dod.criterion: Zero prescriptive hardcoded agent name references in .claude/skills/ pipeline docs
Role-resolution preamble in all SKILL.md files
Agent personality cross-references use role titles
Full grep verification report produced

tasks.title: Add role-resolution preamble to all SKILL.md files

dod.criterion: directive/SKILL.md contains role-resolution preamble that reads agent-registry.json and maps roles to agents
All 10 SKILL.md files have role-resolution instructions
Name references within SKILL.md files converted to role-based language

tasks.title: Convert high-density pipeline docs to role-based references

dod.criterion: 09-execute-projects.md, 07-plan-approval.md, 06-technical-audit.md, 00-delegation-and-triage.md, 05-morgan-planning.md — zero prescriptive hardcoded name references
Role references use natural language ('the CTO') not template variables
JSON/code examples use role-based identifiers

tasks.title: Convert remaining pipeline docs and all reference docs

dod.criterion: All remaining pipeline docs (10-wrapup, 07b, 04, 03, 11, 08) converted
casting-rules.md uses role-based casting while preserving logic
All template/prompt and schema docs converted

tasks.title: Convert agent personality files' cross-references to role-based language

dod.criterion: Cross-references to other agents use role titles not names
Each agent's own name within their own file is preserved
No agent filenames changed

tasks.title: Convert lessons files and verify full coverage

dod.criterion: All prescriptive name references in lesson files converted
Historical/narrative references preserved as-is
Full-repo grep verification: zero prescriptive name references remain
Verification report produced
